records.rationale: Immunosuppressant with a narrow therapeutic index where subtherapeutic levels risk rejection and supratherapeutic levels cause toxicity; requires whole-blood trough monitoring

records.therapeutic_interval: Whole-blood trough concentration target set by transplant indication and concomitant immunosuppression (commonly in the region of 4-15 ng/mL depending on protocol)

records.rationale: Aminoglycoside with a narrow margin between effective and toxic systemic exposure; excessive trough concentrations cause cumulative nephrotoxicity and irreversible ototoxicity, requiring therapeutic drug monitoring for systemic use

records.therapeutic_interval: Regimen-dependent target concentrations; low trough targets with peak or AUC monitoring
